name: Twinkie Cake with Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the twinkies in a 9x13 inch pan.
2. Mix the strawberry Jell-O with boiling water until dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture over the twinkies and refrigerate overnight.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the instant vanilla pudding with cold milk until smooth.
5. Pour the pudding mixture over the twinkies and jello layer.
6. Refrigerate until set.
7. Top with sliced strawberries.
8. Cover with cool whip.
9. Top with more sliced strawberries.
10. Refrigerate before serving.
